regions.comment: OSWORD &0A parameter block: [0]=ASCII char in/out, [1..8]=8 bytes of font bitmap returned
ASCII string table (each terminated with &0D), printed by print_doubled_string

comments.0x3300: Inter-level loading screen: prints 'LOADING' / 'PLEASE WAIT' then jumps to &30F8 (the level loader in CODE2).
comments.0x3325: Stage-clear celebration: 'WOW!' / 'LEVEL X COMPLETED' then 'BONUS X000' with a score-rolling animation; optional '+ EXTRA SHIP!' if score crosses the threshold; returns RTS.
comments.0x3432: Continue / game-over: if &91 (continues left) is non-zero, decrement it and offer a '10' (10 seconds) countdown 'PRESS SPACE TO / CONTINUE PLAY!'. Times out via INKEY at &FFF4 to the final game-over branch. Resets score on continue and re-enters at stage_loading_screen.
comments.0x3501: OSWORD &0A parameter block. [0]=ASCII code in / unused on out; [1..8] = 8 rows of the OS font bitmap returned. (Bytes shown as NOPs are just zero/EA placeholders — the OS overwrites them.)
comments.0x3513: GET READY! overlay during the &E2..&EC stretch of the per-level scroll counter (&80). Bit 0 of &80 alternates 'draw' / 'erase'; &8F=1 means erase from a different code path. Plots gfx_text_get_ready (or lev_erase_brush) at col 13, row &C0 via the standard sprite blitter.
comments.0x3560: Doubled-height string printer. Inputs: A=COLOUR (printed as VDU 17,A), X=column, Y=row, (&95/&96)=string address (loaded into the self-modified LDA at print_str_lda_sm). For each char: OSWORD &0A reads the OS font bitmap; we then redefine VDU chars 225 (top half) and 226 (bottom half) so the 8 source rows become a scanline-stretched two-cell glyph; print 225, back-1, down-1, 226, up-1. CR (&0D) terminates.
comments.0x350A: OSWORD &0A trampoline: read the 8-byte font bitmap for the character in chardef_buf back into chardef_r0..r7. Called per character from print_doubled_string.
comments.0x3585: Top of per-character print loop in print_doubled_string.
comments.0x3587: Self-modified LDA &XXXX,X — the operand bytes at print_str_src_lo / print_str_src_hi were patched from (&95/&96) at routine entry to point at the source string.
comments.0x3588: Self-mod operand LO byte of the LDA at print_str_lda_sm.
comments.0x3589: Self-mod operand HI byte of the LDA at print_str_lda_sm.
comments.0x3639: 'LEVEL X COMPLETED' — the 'X' at &363F is overwritten with the level digit (ASCII '1'..'8') before printing.
comments.0x364B: 'BONUS X000' — 'X' at &3651 overwritten with the level digit; the three '0' digits become an animated score roll-up at &3652..&3654 (carry chain mirrors the per-decimal-digit score store at &2A02..&2A05).
comments.0x3656: '+ EXTRA SHIP!' (printed by stage_clear_screen only if the score has crossed an extra-ship threshold).
comments.0x3682: '10' — first char at &3682 is the displayed seconds (set to '1' or '0' depending on the count), second char at &3683 rolls '0'..'9' during the per-second countdown.
comments.0x3685: 'CREDITS:00' — the trailing '00' at &368D/&368E shows the player's credit count, written before the print call.
